zh.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I是Rogues De Roye的兒子，於1165年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。他於1193年與Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I是Rogues De Roye的儿子，于1165年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。他于1193年与Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I was born in 1165, in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France as the son of Rogues De Roye. He married Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté in 1193, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1230, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I est né en 1165, à Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, fils de Rogues De Roye. Il a épousé Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté en 1193, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1230, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I wurde 1165 in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Rogues De Roye geboren. Er hat 1193 in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I è nato il nel 1165 nel Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia come figlio di Rogues De Roye. Lui sposato Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté nel 1193, nel Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1230, nel Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye Iは1165年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメモントディディエルでRogues De Royeの息子として生まれた。1193年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメロイでMarie-Marguerite De La Fertéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメロイで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I(은)는 1165년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 몽디디어에서 Rogues De Roye의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1193년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I nasceu em 1165, em Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França filho de Rogues De Roye. Ele casou-se com Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté em 1193, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1230, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I родился в 1165 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его отца звали Rogues De Roye. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté в 1193 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Raoul De Roye I nació en 1165, en Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia como hijo de Rogues De Roye. Se casó con Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté en 1193, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1230, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
